library: Digital Transformation of the Finance Function — peer-reviewed corpus
sourcing_policy: All PDFs are peer-reviewed academic papers. Open-access papers are downloaded directly from the publisher under their CC license. Paywalled papers are accessed via FAMNIT (NUK / Univ. of Primorska consortium) institutional license under fair-use academic research terms. Stored locally and served by the deployed app under retrieval-snippet display only.

papers.title: How the Chief Financial Officer (CFO) affects digital transformation
papers.notes: In-press version (unedited). Cite with 'in press' note. Nature/Springer OA.

papers.title: Can CFOs' overseas experience contribute to corporate digital transformation: evidence from China
papers.authors: Wu, L.; Xu, C.; Qi, L.; Lam, J.; Chen, G.

papers.title: Prototyping and implementing Robotic Process Automation in accounting firms: Benefits, challenges and opportunities to audit automation
papers.authors: Perdana, A.; Lee, W. E.; Kim, C. M.
papers.journal: International Journal of Accounting Information Systems
papers.notes: Tier-1 IJAIS (Elsevier). Field study of RPA prototyping in accounting firms.

papers.title: Machine learning-based automation of accounting services: An exploratory case study
papers.authors: Bavaresco, R. S.; Nesi, L. C.; Barbosa, J. L. V. et al.
papers.journal: International Journal of Accounting Information Systems
papers.notes: Tier-1 IJAIS. TAM-based field study of ML chatbot for repetitive accounting tasks.

papers.title: Advancement of cloud-based accounting effectiveness, decision-making quality, and firm performance through digital transformation and digital leadership: Empirical evidence from Vietnam
papers.authors: Bui, H. Q.; Tran, A. H.; Tu, T. H.; Nguyen, P. N.
papers.notes: PLS-SEM on 252 large firms; cloud accounting → firm performance.

papers.title: Digitalization of the finance function: Automation, analytics, and finance function effectiveness
papers.authors: Bedford, D. S.; Derichs, D.; Hoozée, S.; Malmi, T.; Messner, M.; Sinha, V. K.; Van der Kolk, B.; Verbeeten, F.
papers.notes: Tier-1 Mgmt Accounting Research (Elsevier). Survey of 137 finance professionals + 11 interviews. Authors from UTS, Aalto, Ghent, Innsbruck, VU Amsterdam, Utrecht.

papers.title: A literature review on the impact of digitalisation on management control
papers.notes: Springer-DEAL OA. SLR of 116 articles on digital management control — covers planning, forecasting, RPA, talent shift.

papers.title: Machine Learning in Management Accounting Research: Literature Review and Pathways for the Future
papers.authors: Ranta, M.; Ylinen, M.; Järvenpää, M.
papers.notes: Tier-1 EAR (T&F). Aalto/JYU group (Finnish management accounting school).

papers.title: Elusive boundaries, power relations, and knowledge production: A systematic review of the literature on digitalization in accounting
papers.journal: International Journal of Accounting Information Systems
papers.notes: Knudsen (NTNU). Tier-1 IJAIS. Canonical SLR of digitalization in accounting.

papers.title: Optimizing Business Performance Through Effective Accounting Information Systems: The Role of System Competence and Information Quality
papers.authors: Zohry, A. F.; Al-Dhubaibi, A. A. S.
papers.journal: Journal of Risk and Financial Management
papers.notes: MDPI JRFM. SEM on 123 firms linking AIS competence + information quality to performance.

papers.title: Digital Transformation and the Quality of Accounting Information Systems in the Public Sector: Evidence from Developing Countries
papers.authors: Hamdy, A.; Diab, A.; Eissa, A. M.
papers.notes: MDPI IJFS. Empirical MENA study on DT impact on AIS quality.

papers.title: Digital technologies and sustainability accounting, reporting and assurance: framework and research opportunities
papers.authors: de Villiers, C.; Dimes, R.; Molinari, M.
papers.notes: Emerald Meditari. Verify volume/issue/pages on Emerald page when finalizing report citation.

papers.title: The Digitalization of Corporate Sustainability Reporting: A Systematic Literature Review and Synthesis for Future Research
papers.authors: Hyk, V.; Vysochan, Oleh; Vysochan, Olha
papers.journal: Journal of Risk and Financial Management
papers.notes: MDPI JRFM. SLR of 193 publications on digital sustainability reporting (XBRL, ESG digitization, CSRD).

papers.title: Integrating Digital Technologies in Sustainability Accounting and Reporting: Perceptions of Professional Cloud Computing Users
papers.authors: Petcu, M. A.; Sobolevschi-David, M.-I.; Stefan, et al.
papers.notes: MDPI Electronics. Empirical EU survey on cloud + sustainability reporting integration.

papers.title: Big data in financial risk management: evidence, advances, and open questions: a systematic review
papers.authors: Theodorakopoulos, L.; Theodoropoulou, A.; Bakalis, A.
papers.subtopic: Big data financial risk / cybersecurity proxy
papers.notes: Frontiers in AI. SLR of 21 studies on neural nets, ensembles, hybrids in financial risk.
